question: Choose payment processor: Stripe (2.9% + easy), Adyen (2.1% + complex), or PayPal (3.5% + instant)?
why_winner_won: Choose Stripe as your payment processor due to its exceptional developer experience and ease of implementation, which significantly outweigh the marginally higher fees compared to Adyen. All analysts agree that the complexity of Adyen's setup makes it impractical for most businesses, while Stripe's balance of cost and usability ensures a faster time-to-market.

strengths: Best developer experience with reasonable fees and fastest implementation.
Exceptional developer experience enhances integration ease.
Excellent developer experience ensures fast, low-effort implementation and rapid time-to-value.
weaknesses: Middle-ground approach means no clear advantage on any single dimension.
Moderate transaction costs limit overall savings.
Transaction costs are higher than Adyen, impacting long-term margins.

strengths: Lowest transaction costs offer significant long-term margin improvement.
Lowest fees deliver measurable cost savings at any volume.
Lowest transaction cost offers better margins.
weaknesses: High complexity and resource requirements make implementation difficult and slow.
Complex setup may deter some users.
Complex integration requires specialized expertise and delays launch.

strengths: Instant trust boosts customer confidence significantly.
Instant customer trust and broad user base ensures immediate conversion potential.
Instant customer trust and fastest implementation possible.
weaknesses: Highest transaction fees significantly impact long-term profitability and margins.
Highest fees erode margins significantly over scale.
